## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly check-in between Ramp and GrowthX Labs to discuss content strategy, performance, and optimization.](https://fathom.video/share/fFPNGz_bKcZoLPgdexZZKJ2k8KhQE_Ad?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content production is on track, with 10-15 new articles/week plus content refreshes](https://fathom.video/share/fFPNGz_bKcZoLPgdexZZKJ2k8KhQE_Ad?tab=summary&timestamp=157.0)
  - [Focus on finance operations topics (treasury, cash management, liquidity) and long-tail business credit card content](https://fathom.video/share/fFPNGz_bKcZoLPgdexZZKJ2k8KhQE_Ad?tab=summary&timestamp=581.0)
  - [Exploring automated title tag updates for month-specific content](https://fathom.video/share/fFPNGz_bKcZoLPgdexZZKJ2k8KhQE_Ad?tab=summary&timestamp=834.0)
  - [Considering targeted backlink acquisition strategy to boost rankings for high-difficulty keywords](https://fathom.video/share/fFPNGz_bKcZoLPgdexZZKJ2k8KhQE_Ad?tab=summary&timestamp=997.0)

## Topics

### Content Production and Review Process

  - [New content ideas presented; team to review and provide feedback](https://fathom.video/share/fFPNGz_bKcZoLPgdexZZKJ2k8KhQE_Ad?tab=summary&timestamp=161.0)
  - [Airtable used for content management; "Ready to Start" status for upcoming content](https://fathom.video/share/fFPNGz_bKcZoLPgdexZZKJ2k8KhQE_Ad?tab=summary&timestamp=235.0)
  - [Ali to review final drafts before publication](https://fathom.video/share/fFPNGz_bKcZoLPgdexZZKJ2k8KhQE_Ad?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [Holding off on "comprehensive guide to tax expense categories" due to potential cannibalization](https://fathom.video/share/fFPNGz_bKcZoLPgdexZZKJ2k8KhQE_Ad?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)

### Content Refresh Strategy

  - [Implementing 6-month rule for content refreshes to allow time for ranking](https://fathom.video/share/fFPNGz_bKcZoLPgdexZZKJ2k8KhQE_Ad?tab=summary&timestamp=393.0)
  - [Focusing on blog content, filtering out redirected URLs](https://fathom.video/share/fFPNGz_bKcZoLPgdexZZKJ2k8KhQE_Ad?tab=summary&timestamp=468.0)
  - [Exploring automated title tag updates for month-specific content (e.g., credit card listicles)](https://fathom.video/share/fFPNGz_bKcZoLPgdexZZKJ2k8KhQE_Ad?tab=summary&timestamp=834.0)
  - [Implementing GPT extension to update months in titles, connected to Airtable and Webflow](https://fathom.video/share/fFPNGz_bKcZoLPgdexZZKJ2k8KhQE_Ad?tab=summary&timestamp=875.0)

### Keyword and Topic Focus

  - [Expanding into finance operations topics: treasury, cash management, liquidity](https://fathom.video/share/fFPNGz_bKcZoLPgdexZZKJ2k8KhQE_Ad?tab=summary&timestamp=581.0)
  - [Testing long-tail versions of successful business credit card content](https://fathom.video/share/fFPNGz_bKcZoLPgdexZZKJ2k8KhQE_Ad?tab=summary&timestamp=746.0)
  - [Exploring niche focus (e.g., "best cards for photographers") for existing card content](https://fathom.video/share/fFPNGz_bKcZoLPgdexZZKJ2k8KhQE_Ad?tab=summary&timestamp=808.0)

### Backlink Acquisition Strategy

  - [Previous efforts paused due to low-quality links](https://fathom.video/share/fFPNGz_bKcZoLPgdexZZKJ2k8KhQE_Ad?tab=summary&timestamp=963.0)
  - [Considering targeted outreach to high domain authority sites for content collaboration](https://fathom.video/share/fFPNGz_bKcZoLPgdexZZKJ2k8KhQE_Ad?tab=summary&timestamp=1009.0)
  - [Potential to leverage Ramp's brand and combine with ABM strategy for dual-purpose outreach](https://fathom.video/share/fFPNGz_bKcZoLPgdexZZKJ2k8KhQE_Ad?tab=summary&timestamp=1016.0)

### Performance Tracking and Reporting

  - [Implementing SEO testing and reporting for content refreshes](https://fathom.video/share/fFPNGz_bKcZoLPgdexZZKJ2k8KhQE_Ad?tab=summary&timestamp=1332.0)
  - [Weekly reports on refreshed URLs, site increases, and impression growth](https://fathom.video/share/fFPNGz_bKcZoLPgdexZZKJ2k8KhQE_Ad?tab=summary&timestamp=1344.0)
  - [Aiming to regain lost traffic through consistent content refresh efforts](https://fathom.video/share/fFPNGz_bKcZoLPgdexZZKJ2k8KhQE_Ad?tab=summary&timestamp=1363.0)

### Resource Allocation

  - [Confirming production capacity exceeds 100,000 words/month](https://fathom.video/share/fFPNGz_bKcZoLPgdexZZKJ2k8KhQE_Ad?tab=summary&timestamp=1417.0)
  - [Delivering 10-15 articles/week plus 500 content refreshes](https://fathom.video/share/fFPNGz_bKcZoLPgdexZZKJ2k8KhQE_Ad?tab=summary&timestamp=1432.0)

## Next Steps

  - Review and provide feedback on new content ideas in Airtable
  - Discuss potential automation of title tag updates for month-specific content
  - Explore targeted backlink acquisition strategy, potentially leveraging existing outbound email infrastructure
  - [Implement content refresh workflow for expense classifier pages](https://fathom.video/share/fFPNGz_bKcZoLPgdexZZKJ2k8KhQE_Ad?tab=summary&timestamp=1201.0)
  - Continue weekly reporting on content performance and refresh impact
